an2.46:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these two kinds of assemblies. What two? The dregs of an assembly and the cream of an assembly.
an2.46:1.2: "And what is the dregs of an assembly? The assembly in which the bhikkhus enter upon a wrong course on account of desire, hatred, delusion, or fear is called the dregs of an assembly.
an2.46:1.3: "And what is the cream of an assembly? The assembly in which the bhikkhus do not enter upon a wrong course on account of desire, hatred, delusion, or fear is called the cream of an assembly.
an2.46:1.4: "These, bhikkhus, are the two kinds of assemblies. Of these two kinds of assemblies, the cream of an assembly is foremost."
